title: Chakradharpur Heat Wave
lead: Chakradharpur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.29. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Chakradharpur has led to extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 21.0 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 35%, and the wind speed is 10.0 km/h, adding to the discomfort. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
